ENES150 Transfer LEAD Seminar | (2 Credits)

This seminar focuses on personal and professional development for transfer students in the A. James Clark School of Engineering. Transfer LEAD is a program for Engineering transfer students with four main outcomes: Learn, Educate, Adapt, Direct. Topics covered in this course include campus resources, student identity development, leadership development, and student outreach. Students will learn educational theory in order to develop a sense of leadership as students in the Clark School of Engineering.

Restriction: Eligible external transfer students in the A. James Clark School of Engineering; and permission of instructor.
